title: Research Claim
description: A public or private claim made by this project. Every public claim requires evidence, a verification status, and a limitation statement.

claim_text.description: The exact text of the claim as it appears publicly

evidence_source.description: Evidence ID from evidence_index.csv that supports this claim

limitation.description: Explicit limitation on scope or generalizability of this claim

paper_counterpart.description: Paper section where this claim appears, or null

product_counterpart.description: Product feature this claim describes, or null

public_private_status.description: Whether this claim may be published

date_claimed.description: ISO 8601 date when this claim was first made
